name: Mexicali Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the skin from the chicken breasts and wipe them with damp paper towels.
2. Beat the eggs in a pie plate or shallow bowl with a fork; beat in taco sauce and salt.
3. Combine the bread crumbs, chili powder, cumin, garlic powder, and oregano in a second pie plate or dish.
4. Dip each chicken breast in the egg mixture, then into the crumb mixture to coat well.
5. Arrange the coated chicken breasts in a single layer in a large jelly-roll pan; drizzle with melted butter.
6. Bake at 375°F for 35 minutes until crisp and tender.
7. To serve, pile shredded lettuce on a large serving platter. Arrange the baked chicken on top. Garnish with shredded cheese, tomato wedges, and sour cream.
8. Serve hot, warm, or at room temperature.
Makes 8 servings.
